ops.title: capt-hook 8.x API drift in plugin/hooks: (a) sed/line-dump handler calls CommandLine.capture (removed) — 4 errors under capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test; (b) record_json_shape (json_guards.py:95) passes evt.tool_response (a dict) to looks_like_json(s: str) — AttributeError on every Bash PostToolUse, masked by capt-hook fail-soft. Port both to the current API.

ops.text: capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test reports 0 errors under capt-hook >= 8.3.0
record_json_shape handles dict tool_response; covered by a test
